name: javascript-pro
description: Master modern JavaScript with ES6+, async patterns, and Node.js
capabilities: Write modern JavaScript using ES6+ features like destructuring, modules, and classes
Implement robust async patterns with promises, async/await, and generators
Debug complex async issues including race conditions and event loop behavior
Optimize JavaScript performance for both Node.js and browser environments
Handle cross-browser compatibility with polyfill strategies
Create clean module structures with proper exports and error handling
author: sickn33
securitySummary: Prompt-only skill with no executable code. Static analysis scanned 0 files (0 lines) and detected 0 security issues. No suspicious patterns, risk factors, or malicious intent found. The skill provides legitimate JavaScript development guidance with no security concerns.
valueStatement: Struggle with async patterns or modern JS syntax? This skill provides expert guidance on ES6+, promises, async/await, event loops, and cross-runtime compatibility for Node.js and browser development.
limitations: Provides JavaScript guidance but does not execute code directly
Focuses on JavaScript runtime, not TypeScript architecture design
Does not handle backend architecture decisions beyond JavaScript implementation
Cannot run tests or profile performance without user execution

useCases.title: Modern JavaScript Migration
useCases.description: A developer needs to migrate legacy JavaScript code to modern ES6+ standards with improved patterns and better error handling.

useCases.targetUser: Backend developer working with Node.js APIs
useCases.title: Async Debugging
useCases.description: A engineer faces race conditions or promise rejection issues in their Node.js application and needs expert debugging strategies.

useCases.title: Cross-Platform Compatibility
useCases.description: A team building browser applications needs guidance on polyfills, bundle optimization, and cross-browser compatibility.

promptTemplates.title: Convert to Modern JavaScript
promptTemplates.prompt: Convert this legacy JavaScript code to modern ES6+ syntax. Use destructuring, arrow functions, and const/let appropriately.

promptTemplates.title: Fix Async Issue
promptTemplates.prompt: Help debug this async code. It has a race condition where the promise resolves before the event handler completes.
promptTemplates.scenario: Debugging promise chains and async flows

promptTemplates.title: Optimize Performance
promptTemplates.prompt: Profile this JavaScript code for performance bottlenecks. Focus on event loop blocking and memory usage in Node.js.

promptTemplates.title: Cross-Browser Strategy
promptTemplates.prompt: Design a polyfill strategy for this ES6+ code. Target browsers: Chrome 90+, Safari 14+, Firefox 88+.

bestPractices: Always use async/await instead of promise chains for better readability and error handling
Handle errors at appropriate boundaries with try/catch blocks rather than per-operation
Consider bundle size impact when using modern features in browser environments
antiPatterns: Avoid mixing callbacks with promises in the same code path as it creates error handling complexity
Do not use Promise.all() when operations must complete sequentially, use for...of with await instead
Never ignore promise rejections by omitting catch handlers or .catch() blocks

faq.question: When should I use this skill?
faq.answer: Use this skill proactively when working with JavaScript for Node.js or browsers, especially when dealing with async code, ES6+ features, or performance optimization.

faq.question: Does this skill write TypeScript code?
faq.answer: No, this skill focuses on JavaScript. For TypeScript architecture and type system guidance, use a dedicated TypeScript skill.

faq.question: Can this skill debug my existing JavaScript code?
faq.answer: Yes, it excels at debugging async behavior, event loop issues, race conditions, and performance problems in JavaScript code.

faq.question: What JavaScript versions does this skill support?
faq.answer: This skill specializes in modern ES6+ JavaScript but can also help migrate legacy code to modern standards.

faq.question: Does this skill handle framework-specific code?
faq.answer: This skill focuses on core JavaScript, async patterns, and runtime APIs. It does not specialize in React, Vue, or other framework specifics.

faq.question: Can this skill help with browser compatibility?
faq.answer: Yes, it provides polyfill strategies and cross-browser compatibility guidance for modern JavaScript features.
